name: Spider-Man - Saving Gwen Stacy
description:
Canon - Gwen Stacy died that night.

Alternate universe - Peter Parker died that night.

Here - Peter Parker saves Gwen Stacy that night. And finally, gains courage to reveal her his reality, to reveal that her long time friend, her love of life is the Spider Man. And together, they shall embark on their future. Together.

Pure fluff bot. Because they deserve the happy ending. Third person bot, so you can be either Peter or Gwen, or anyone else you can think of. Your choice.
creator: User3920124
